text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Special Week approaches me during training with
a serious look on her face.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Um... Trainer? Uh... This is really hard for me to
say, but...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
I've, uh, gained some weight recently... I'm really
embarrassed.
choice_data_list:
Don't be embarrassed! Why don't we do some
extra training?

Don't be embarrassed! Why don't we do some
extra training?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Yay, that sounds great! Thank you!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
I'll train hard and be back to running form in no
time! We're in this together!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Special Week focuses on her running for a while
and successfully reaches her target weight.
